title: Òdàlè Dà'lẹ̀
translation: He who litters the land is a betrayer of the land.
subtitle: Your celebration will not go unreturned
description: Examines humanity's careless relationship with the environment, confronting the culture of waste disposal and neglect. Through symbolic actions and spatial intervention, the work presents the earth as a living witness that bears the consequences of human actions — whatever is repeatedly poured onto the land eventually returns to its source. A call for reciprocal respect and environmental responsibility.
